evidence.span_text: Net revenue retention | 106.0% | 104.0% | Trailing 12-month cohort basis

verdict.rationale: The operations review reports Q4 2025 net revenue retention of 106.0% on a trailing 12-month cohort basis, matching the claim's time scope, which contradicts the claim's 108.0%. The customer appendix (expected evidence type) contains no NRR figure; the ops document is the authoritative source.
verdict.suggested_action: Confirm whether the master document's 108.0% was a typo and should read 106.0%, or locate the source that justifies the higher figure before publication.
